profile.name: Ognjen Perisic
profile.title: Cybersecurity Evidence Portfolio
profile.intro: Structured evidence of SOC projects, incident triage, phishing investigations, threat intelligence, and practical security operations work.
profile.about: This portfolio demonstrates documented SOC capability through practical investigations, technical write-ups, and project evidence. It is organized to show problem-solving, analytical thinking, and security insight across phishing detection, email forensics, SIEM operations, incident response, ITSM, networking, and threat hunting.

projects.title: Using Microsoft Sentinel
projects.description: Built SIEM-focused evidence demonstrating data onboarding, detection use cases, and analyst investigation workflow.

projects.title: Analysing a Phishing Email
projects.description: Investigated suspicious sender patterns, malicious URLs, urgent social engineering language, and authentication anomalies.

projects.title: Using Suricata and Wireshark
projects.description: Correlated IDS alerts with packet captures to identify suspicious network behavior and validate incident severity.

projects.title: Incident Priority Breakdown
projects.description: Defined practical priority models to support SOC escalation based on impact, urgency, and confidence level.

projects.title: Email Forensics Deep Dive
projects.description: Traced phishing origin through header fields and received paths, validated SPF/DKIM/DMARC, and assessed malicious artifacts.

projects.title: Threat Intelligence Enrichment
projects.description: Mapped phishing indicators to known campaigns and attack patterns using external intelligence sources.

projects.title: ITSM to SIEM Integration
projects.description: Documenting how Zendesk tickets, SLA workflows, and SOC detections connect for measurable incident handling.

projects.title: Networking Fundamentals Labs
projects.description: Hands-on projects with Nmap, Nessus, honeypot/canary controls, and Cisco Packet Tracer for foundational SOC skills.

contact.heading: Connect with me
contact.subheading: If you are hiring for SOC or junior cybersecurity roles, send me a message and I will share relevant evidence packs.
